title: staff — trait composition
description: Four owned traits. `BelongsToStaff` is the FK trait for downstream models (TeamMember, Session, ShiftAssignment); `BelongsToCoach` for coach-scoped rows. `WrapsUser` is a Staff-specific mixin that adds the User relation + delegated PII accessors (surface layer for full_name / email / phone / avatar / locale — matches how Profile relates to User in the user module). `HasCoachProfile` is the inverse-side convenience on Staff for `->coach()` hasOne. Order matters when composed with `BelongsToTenant` / `BelongsToBranch` — tenant MUST come first so scope chains observe the tenant context; branch precedes the module-owned traits.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a `staff_id` FK. Adds the `staff()` belongsTo relation, a `resolveOnStaff(?Staff)` query scope that filters `WHERE staff_id = ?` (falling back to the caller's `Request::activeStaff()` when the arg is omitted), and a `booted()` hook that fills `staff_id = active_staff_id()` on `creating` when the field is null AND the current request carries a resolved active staff (rare — used by CLI + admin flows). Refuses to save a row whose `staff_id` points at a Staff in a different tenant than the row itself (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling).
usedBy: teams::TeamMember (Wave 3 — polymorphic; when member_type='staff', member_id references Staff.id)
composition_notes: Order: `BelongsToTenant` must appear BEFORE `BelongsToStaff` in the trait list so the tenant scope resolves first.

`BelongsToBranch` is IMPLIED by the staff (staff.branch_id) — do NOT compose `BelongsToBranch` on models that already carry `BelongsToStaff` (the branch cascades through staff → branch_id in queries).
The `booted()` fill hook is off by default. Turn on per-model via `bool $fillStaffOnCreating = true` in the composing model (rarely useful outside CLI paths).

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a `coach_id` FK. Adds the `coach()` belongsTo relation + a `resolveOnCoach(?Coach)` query scope. Refuses cross-tenant coach references at save time (same defense-in-depth pattern as BelongsToStaff).
usedBy: teams::TeamMember (Wave 3 — when member_type='coach', member_id references Coach.id)

owned.description: Composed onto the Staff model itself. Adds `user()` belongsTo relation + a family of delegated accessors that pull from User + Profile (full_name / display_name / email / phone_e164 / avatar_url / locale / timezone) with fallbacks to Branch → Region defaults for locale + timezone. Callers rarely reach through to Staff->user->profile directly; the accessors keep the PII cluster behind one redactor boundary. Also exposes a `withDelegatedProfile()` eager-load scope that joins User + Profile in a single query — used by the /api/v1/staff read paths.
conflicts_with: The `HasProfile` trait from the user module — Staff would end up with two `profile()` methods. Composers pick one: Staff uses `WrapsUser` (indirect access via User.profile), the User model uses `HasProfile` (direct hasOne).

owned.description: Composed onto the Staff model. Adds `->coach()` hasOne over Coach filtered by `staff_id = self.id` (single row per staff at a time; enforced by unique index). Also exposes `->isCoach(): bool` (true when the hasOne resolves to a live Coach), `->activeCoach(): ?Coach` (nullable when coach.status != 'active').

framework.reason: Both Staff and Coach. Offboarded staff soft-delete for the retention window (see retention.json) before hard-purge.

Staff receives lifecycle notifications (welcome / suspended / offboarded / compensation-changed) — the notification is addressed to the underlying User but this trait exposes the Notifiable interface for direct-to-staff addressing when the caller wants to skip the User redirect.

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md §3.

branch.reason: Staff carries branch_id directly. Coach does NOT — it cascades through staff.branch_id.

user.reason: Staff carries user_id + composes BelongsToUser for the .own scope suffix. `staff.view.own` narrows to `WHERE user_id = current_user_id`.

audit.reason: Every mutation to staff / coaches is compliance-relevant. Compensation columns write to a SEPARATE audit table (`staff_compensation_history`) with 7-year retention gated at row-level by the CompensationGate binding.

activity.reason: Staff lifecycle transitions + coach-status + certification adds feed the tenant activity feed. Compensation changes DO NOT feed activity (private-tier).

staff.notes: Order matters. BelongsToTenant precedes every scope-observing trait. BelongsToUser must come BEFORE WrapsUser so the User relation is registered before the delegated-accessor mixin queries it. HasCoachProfile is inverse-side convenience and can sit anywhere after BelongsToTenant. No BelongsToOrganization / BelongsToRegion — staff cascades both through branch (hierarchy.md §2 + tenancy-columns.md §5). Notifiable is composed so notification listeners can address the Staff directly (the notification renderer chooses to route via User's channels; the Staff-level shim keeps the addressing surface consistent).

coach.notes: NO BelongsToBranch — coach cascades branch through staff. NO BelongsToUser — coach reaches user through staff → user. Auditable is critical — certification adds/removes are compliance-relevant for the coach_certifications_verified Enterprise entitlement.
